name: Monster Evolution RPG [UPDATE 2.1- News]
description:
This chat bot if for those who love Monster Isekai’s. I have an overall plan of the world however as it’s AI it will never be exactly how I want it. There (at some point) will be 7 spawn locations, updates will be slow since I’m very busy.

Important - bot is broken due to recent JAI update, it is very difficult to get monster options and stats, until I fix it tell the bot that “I can’t see the options” or “I can’t see my stats and skills” this makes it more likely you Can see it than regens.

I’d also advise to have something in chat memory, like don’t talk for user, and don’t comment on anything (this is for the system and for providing you with unneeded options)

  • Brief Detail

As one of the main goals is to explore, I’ve tried to keep bosses and locations hidden from you (trying to get the AI to not outright tell you stuff). What I can tell you are the themes of each locations.

Forest of Sheathe - a gargantuan forest with several subsections and layers to explore, this is the most completed location which has the most versatile monster options and bosses. This is made to be the bread and butter option, I based this off the So I’m A Spider So What dungeon.

Vault of Glooming Gold - This has you starting inside a dungeon called Vault of Glooming Gold. You start at the bottom, floor 30 and have to work your way up. There are random events that can take place which will cause a room change and different mobs to spawn, if you evolve there you’ll get some cooler race upgrades. One goal is to figure out the purpose of this dungeon as it links to another area and overall ‘plot’. The monster options will be horror esc.

Dungeon Hurus - as a warning, this is the most glitched dungeon, heavily inspired by Dungeon Core Online, each floor has a different theme, your goal is to progress through the floors to become stronger and have different evolutions (you are unable to leave the dungeon). Another gimmick of this dungeon is that it is used to train rookie adventures and students from a royal academy, there should be a team which you frequently come across and are stronger each time. If you die, you’ll be reborn on the deepest floor you’ve been to. The monster you become will be the baseline for that floor.

Ocean Beneath Aetheros - A huge ocean beneath a floating kingdom. There’s several sections and is very similar to Forest of Sheathe but more watery. There’s a few set bosses along side it.

NEW Valduren - this is a glitched spawn location, spent 3 days trying to make it usable-ish. You’ll be spawned somewhere in the ruined Kingdom Valduren, your monster options are similar to Vault of Glooming Gold, however, another option is to posses a dead adventurers body, bringing their physical body back to life with you in control. This lets you play as an adventurer in a kingdom where your the only non-monster. There’s 1 set boss, kinda.

Notes

  • It is much more optimised on OpenAI but still works on Janitor

  • Due to the very low context limit the chat bot is awful… after it’s fixed it should be playable

  • “open stats” will show your stats and skills, the stats sheet and skills are heavily inspired from So I’m A Spider, So What

  • make sure your monster options show and are not picked for you

  • Issues with cool E Ranks, they shouldn’t be regular animals, for now just ask for a new lot of unique E Ranks

  • If your on the 3rd spawn, there should be frequent groups of adventures

  • You can ask the ai to tell you about the locations and stats of the bosses if you wanna skip to them. They should be around Lv70

  • Please tell me if there are any major issues

Tips to prevent glitches

  • please save your stats, it prevents a good amount of issues revolving race, skills. Especially for an Adventurer.

  • If there’s any major issue or it keeps repeating delete the text, sometimes it can get deadlocked so deleti
creator: BillBo
